steps.title: Locate Bloom's praise
steps.content: The passage explains why Harold Bloom praises Little, Big: the novel blends the naive and sentimental modes even though Schiller treated them as separate categories.

steps.title: State the critic's reason
steps.content: The matching choice says the text presents a reason a literary critic is impressed by a novel. Choice A invents authorial inspiration, Choice C miscasts the text as a comparison with Robert Hass, and Choice D says all writing must fit one category. The answer is B.
